calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR SHORT CAUSE
Off Calendar Sep-17-2007 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Sep-17-2007 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter came regularly on calendar this day, by assignment from the the Presiding Judge Dept. for Court Trial/Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Commissioner Sue M. Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Karen Farnsworth.
Phil Kilduff, Esq. special appearance for Plaintiff: Chase Bank USA, N.A. a corporation.
Plaintiff's Witness: Donna Smith, was sworn and direct examined.
No appearance by the Defendant: Rosalinda Callejas.
Exhibit 1- Card Agreement------------------------------------------ID/EVID.
Exhibit 2- Statements----------------------------------------------ID/EVID.
After hearing the testimony and evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defendants as follows:
Principal $45,729.27
Attorney's Fees $2,825.00
Costs $408.00, for a Total of $48,962.27
Counsel stipulated for the return of the Exhibits in open court, and to prepare Judgment for signature.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-01-2007 Set For Trial On Sep-17-07 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
